name: My employer says the injury happened outside work hours—is that true?
description: No. If you were on premises or performing work duties, it's covered regardless of exact clock-in time. The "premises rule" and "course of employment" protect yo

mainEntity.name: My employer says the injury happened outside work hours—is that true?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. If you were on premises or performing work duties, it's covered regardless of exact clock-in time. The "premises rule" and "course of employment" protect you.
